name: Zhuge Gui (Jungong)
page_title: Zhuge Gui (Jungong) 諸葛珪 (君貢) [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Zhuge Liang’s father. Descended from Zhuge Feng. Governor’s deputy in Taishan.
sections.details:

	諸葛珪 (君貢)


	 Simplified Chinese 
	诸葛珪 (子贡)


	 Pronunciation 
	Zhu1ge3 Gui1 (Jun1gong4)


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Zhūgě Guī (Jūngòng)


	 Wade-Giles 
	Chuko Kuei (Tzŭ-kung)

	 Birthplace 
	Langye

	 Other Names 
	Zigong, 子貢

	 Name Notes 
	His style is entered in the Sanguozhi as Jungong (君貢) but in Sanguo Yanyi as Zigong (子貢). Jungong is likely correct as it stems from Sanguozhi.

full_text:
Zhuge Gui (Jungong) 諸葛珪 (君貢)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Gui (諸葛珪), styledJungong (君貢), was born in Langye. Zhuge Liang’s father. Descended from Zhuge Feng. Governor’s deputy in Taishan. Zhuge Gui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhuge Gui lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
